severity: MEDIUM (downgraded from HIGH after manual verify — see note)
title: canReadGoalSpace blocks all node-board-member access at single-layer check
description: canReadGoalSpace returns false for any chain_user/viewer unconditionally, even when they are valid members of a node_board within that goal_space. The in-file comment acknowledges the gap and defers unioning to S3 handlers.
note_after_verify: Code comment explicitly documents this as S2 scope boundary. Not a hidden bug. Recommend tracking as known scope debt.
recommendation: Pass optional nodeBoardMemberContexts into GoalSpaceContext, or wrap canReadGoalSpace at S3 handler layer with explicit union of nodeBoard membership.

title: Docker compose hardcodes weak default database credentials
description: POSTGRES_USER and POSTGRES_PASSWORD are both 'keplar' (a public, guessable credential) and committed to the repository.
evidence:
POSTGRES_USER: keplar
POSTGRES_PASSWORD: keplar
POSTGRES_DB: keplar
note_after_verify: Verified — file content is exactly as described.
recommendation: Replace with ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD} / ${POSTGRES_USER} env interpolation, add .env.example (gitignored), and add a gitleaks/trufflehog CI step.

title: next.config.ts has no security response headers (CSP/HSTS/X-Frame-Options/X-Content-Type-Options/Referrer-Policy)
description: The Next.js config is minimal. There is no headers() async function exporting CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, or Permissions-Policy.
recommendation: Add an async headers() export with CSP (nonce-based), HSTS preload, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy.

title: No CSRF protection present in S1/S2 codebase or middleware.ts
description: There is no middleware.ts in apps/web/src and no CSRF token validation, no SameSite cookie configuration, and no Origin/Referer check.
evidence: (no middleware.ts, no csrf helper, no cookie config found)
recommendation: Create apps/web/src/middleware.ts that validates Origin header on POST/PATCH/DELETE state-changing requests and enforces SameSite=Strict on cookies.

title: Audit details / actorId / payload accept unredacted user input with no allowlist or sanitization
description: The AuditContext interface accepts actorId, details, and payload with no size limit, no schema validation, and no PII redaction.
recommendation: Add a redactAuditDetails() helper that scrubs sensitive keys recursively. Add a max size cap (e.g. 32KB).

title: users table has no password hash, no auth credential column, and no failed-login tracking
description: The users table has id/name/email/role/preferences/createdAt/lastLoginAt but no password_hash, no api_token_hash, no failed_login_count, no locked_until.
evidence:
export const users = sqliteTable(
  'users', { id, name, email, role, preferences, createdAt, lastLoginAt }
recommendation: Add a separate auth_credentials table keyed by user_id with password_hash (argon2id), failed_login_attempts, and locked_until.

title: actor.role: 'viewer' leaks via canReadGoalSpace early-return path on member-check
description: Same root cause as SEC-001. Viewers are unconditionally denied even with valid node_board membership.
recommendation: Extend GoalSpaceContext to carry the actor's node_board_membership set; allow viewer/chained when member.

title: No CI secret-leak scanner (gitleaks/trufflehog) in web-ci.yml
description: CI runs typecheck + lint + test + build + format:check but has no secret scanning step.
evidence:
- name: Verify (typecheck + lint + test + build + format:check)
  run: pnpm check
recommendation: Add a gitleaks-action step to web-ci.yml that fails on any finding (postgres_password, jwt_secret, anthropic_api_key, openai_api_key).

title: canExecuteCard has no central enforcement of hasPendingConfirmation — caller-must-pass
description: canExecuteCard takes ExecuteCardContext.hasPendingConfirmation as a precomputed boolean the caller supplies. No db-aware convenience centralizes the pending check.
recommendation: Provide a db-aware convenience: canExecuteCardForCardId(db, actor, cardId) that performs the SELECT for pending confirmations internally.
